# Sparkling Stays
> Professional residential and commercial cleaning services in Montreal, Quebec, Canada.
> Serving 25+ neighborhoods across Greater Montreal, Laval, and South Shore.
> Phone: 438-867-8770 | Email: info@sparklingstays.com
> Book online: https://sparklingstays.com/book-now/

## Services
- Home Cleaning: Weekly, biweekly, monthly residential cleaning
- Deep Cleaning: Intensive one-time cleaning for homes and offices
- Commercial Cleaning: Office and business cleaning services
- Maid Services: Ongoing household cleaning help
- Airbnb/Short-term Rental Cleaning: Turnover cleaning for hosts
- Office Cleaning: Professional office and workspace cleaning
- Window Cleaning: Interior window cleaning services
- Post-Renovation Cleaning: Construction and renovation cleanup
- Move In/Out Cleaning: Full clean before or after a move
- Recurring Cleaning: Weekly, biweekly, or monthly plans

## Service Areas
Montreal, Laval, Brossard, Longueuil, Pointe-Claire, Kirkland, Pierrefonds, DDO, Chambly, Saint-Constant, Île-Perrot, West Island, Saint-Laurent, Boucherville, Ville-Marie, Beaconsfield, Baie-d'Urfé, Westmount, Saint-Hubert, Plateau-Mont-Royal, Lachine, CDN, NDG, Rosemont, LaSalle, Vaudreuil-Dorion

## Pricing
Residential cleaning starting from competitive rates. Visit https://sparklingstays.com/pricing/ for current pricing.
